text: What's the current stock price of Apple?
notes: Simple stock lookup; ticker AAPL should be inferred from 'Apple'

text: Show me a summary of my investment portfolio
notes: Direct portfolio summary request with no additional parameters needed

text: Buy 50 shares of Tesla at market price
notes: Market buy order; ticker TSLA inferred; quantity and order type specified

text: What's the exchange rate from USD to Japanese Yen right now?
notes: Currency pair USD/JPY explicitly specified

text: Calculate my ROI on the Google shares I bought at $120 each and now worth $155
notes: purchase price and current price provided; quantity not specified but ROI is price-based

text: What's NVIDIA trading at?
notes: Informal phrasing for stock price lookup; ticker NVDA inferred

text: Place a limit order to sell 100 shares of Microsoft at $420
notes: Sell limit order; ticker MSFT inferred; price and quantity explicit

text: How much is 1 Euro worth in British pounds today?
notes: EUR to GBP exchange rate lookup

text: Give me my full portfolio summary including current valuations
notes: Comprehensive portfolio overview request

text: What's the ROI if I invested $10,000 in Bitcoin 2 years ago and it's now worth $31,000?
notes: ROI calculation with initial investment and current value provided

text: What is Amazon's stock price right now?
notes: Ticker AMZN inferred from 'Amazon'

text: Convert 500 USD to Indian Rupees
notes: Currency conversion implies get_exchange_rate with amount and pair USD/INR

text: Set a stop-loss order for my Meta shares at $450
notes: Stop-loss is a type of order; ticker META inferred; quantity not specified — may need clarification

text: Check Tesla's current stock price and if it's above $250, place a buy order for 20 shares
notes: Conditional chain: get_stock_price first, then conditionally place_order based on price threshold

text: Show me my portfolio summary and then calculate the ROI on my top holding
notes: get_portfolio_summary to identify top holding; calculate_roi uses that position's data

text: Get the current EUR/USD rate and then calculate the ROI on my European bond that yielded 3.2% last year
notes: Exchange rate needed to calculate USD-adjusted ROI on EUR-denominated asset

text: Look up NVIDIA's stock price and compare it to the average price in my portfolio
notes: get_stock_price for NVDA; get_portfolio_summary for portfolio average

text: Pull my portfolio and sell whatever position is currently losing the most
notes: get_portfolio_summary to identify worst performer; place_order to sell that position

text: Check the USD to CHF exchange rate and then place an order to buy CHF 10,000 worth of Swiss stocks
notes: Exchange rate to convert USD budget; place_order with CHF-converted amount

text: Get Apple's current stock price then compute my total ROI given I bought 100 shares at $145
notes: get_stock_price provides current value; calculate_roi uses buy price and shares

text: Review my portfolio and rebalance by buying underweight tech stocks
notes: get_portfolio_summary for allocation analysis; place_order to rebalance underweight holdings

text: What's the GBP to USD exchange rate, and then tell me how much my £50,000 investment is worth in dollars
notes: Exchange rate feeds into conversion calculation (simplified as ROI/value computation)

text: Get the current price of S&P 500 ETF and place a limit buy for 10 units if it's below $480
notes: Conditional: get_stock_price; place_order only if price < $480

text: Check my portfolio value today and calculate my overall ROI since I started investing
notes: get_portfolio_summary for current value; calculate_roi using total cost basis

text: Find out the current USD to CNY rate and buy 1000 shares of Alibaba if the conversion is favorable
notes: Conditional order based on exchange rate outcome

text: Buy some stock
notes: Missing: ticker, quantity, order type (market/limit), price. All required parameters absent

text: What's the stock price?
notes: No ticker or company name specified; must ask which stock

text: Show me my portfolio
notes: Underspecified: which account if multiple? What level of detail? Generally reasonable to proceed

text: What's the exchange rate?
notes: Missing: both currency pair (from and to) must be specified

text: Calculate my ROI
notes: Missing: investment amount, current value, time period. All key parameters absent

text: Sell my shares
notes: Which shares? How many? At what price? All required fields missing

text: Is my portfolio doing well?
notes: 'Doing well' is subjective; needs get_portfolio_summary plus analysis, but the benchmark is unclear

text: Place an order for the stock
notes: No ticker, no quantity, no order type or price. Completely underspecified

text: Check the conversion rate for my trip
notes: Destination currency unknown; source currency assumed USD but trip destination not given

text: How much have I made on my investments?
notes: Could use get_portfolio_summary or calculate_roi; needs clarification on time period and specific holdings

text: Buy low
notes: Informal phrase; no ticker, no quantity, no price threshold defined

text: What's my return on the investment I made last quarter?
notes: No specific investment identified; last quarter is a range not an exact date; needs clarification

text: Get me the latest prices
notes: No tickers specified; 'latest prices' without context is unresolvable

text: Get the current price of Apple, Google, and Microsoft simultaneously
notes: Three parallel get_stock_price calls for AAPL, GOOGL, MSFT

text: Show me my portfolio and check today's prices for my top 3 holdings at the same time
notes: Portfolio summary and multiple price checks in parallel

text: Get EUR/USD and GBP/USD rates simultaneously
notes: Two parallel exchange rate calls for different currency pairs

text: Place a buy order for Tesla and a sell order for Netflix at the same time
notes: Two parallel place_order calls for two different stocks

text: Calculate the ROI on my Tesla and my Amazon positions at the same time
notes: Two parallel calculate_roi calls for two positions

text: Pull my portfolio summary and check the USD to EUR and USD to GBP rates simultaneously
notes: Three parallel calls: portfolio + two exchange rates

text: Buy 10 shares of AMD and simultaneously check the current price of Intel to compare
notes: place_order for AMD and get_stock_price for Intel run in parallel

text: Check all five of my tech stock prices at once: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, META, and NVDA
notes: Five parallel get_stock_price calls

text: Get me the ROI on my three biggest investments and my portfolio overview simultaneously
notes: Three ROI calculations and portfolio summary all in parallel

text: Execute trades to rebalance my portfolio: buy 20 shares of VTSAX and sell 15 shares of QQQM
notes: Two simultaneous place_order calls for rebalancing

text: Check current prices of gold, silver, and crude oil futures simultaneously
notes: Three parallel price lookups for commodity futures

text: Give me my portfolio summary and convert my total value to both EUR and GBP at the same time
notes: Portfolio value fetch and two currency conversions in parallel
